data.summary_suggestion: Query Majestic Link Intelligence data in JSON format
data.description_suggestion: Executes a Majestic API command to retrieve link intelligence data (backlinks, referring domains, anchor text, trust flow, citation flow, etc.) for a specified URL, subdomain, or domain. Accepts 13 parameters to customize the query including target URL, data type, filters, and pagination options. Returns a MajesticResponse object containing the requested link intelligence data in JSON format. Requires valid API key authentication.

data.current_summary: Execute API command via POST (JSON response)
data.summary_suggestion: Query Majestic Link Intelligence data via POST in JSON
data.description_suggestion: Executes a Majestic API command via POST method to retrieve link intelligence data (backlinks, referring domains, anchor text, trust flow, citation flow, etc.) for a specified URL, subdomain, or domain. Accepts request body parameters to customize the query including target URL, data type, filters, and pagination options. Returns a MajesticResponse object containing the requested link intelligence data in JSON format. POST method is preferred for complex queries or when parameter data exceeds URL length limits. Requires valid API key authentication.
